category_sources: Official Netatalk documentation describes the Netatalk manual and AFP file server suite.
source_facts.description says it is a file server for Macs compliant with AFP.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub repository use Netatalk.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links project documentation and describes support resources.
Official Netatalk documentation page says the manual is the primary documentation source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Netatalk/netatalk; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include macos, fileserver, appletalk, network-file-system, and file-sharing-server.
source_facts.description mentions Apple Filing Protocol file server for Macs.
